semantic.role: Infrastructure boundary component that enforces write protection for ArchSpine's internal directories and files.
responsibilities: Defines protected directories (.spine/index, .spine/atlas, .spine/view) and protected file prefixes (.spine/.lock, .spine/cache.db).
Provides file system permission locking/unlocking mechanisms to prevent unauthorized writes via mode changes.
Validates file paths against protected patterns to enforce write boundaries.
Recursively walks directory trees to apply protection policies.
outOfScope: Orchestrating high-level service or engine workflows.
Providing generic file system utilities beyond the defined protection scope.
invariants: Must only depend on Node.js built-in modules (fs, path) for low-level file operations.
Must expose a stable public class interface for write boundary enforcement, not absorb orchestration logic.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Encapsulate file system write protection as a stable infrastructure facade, isolating permission management from business logic.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected in this file; the git intent 'feat(sync): add repair policy and experimental view layer' does not correlate with this component's evidence.
